title: alnus × mayrii
intro: Alnus × mayrii, also known as May's alder or hybrid alder, is a hybrid plant species that combines the characteristics of the green alder (Alnus viridis) and the May alder (Alnus incana). This plant is believed to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high content of tannins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Alnus × mayrii include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of heart disease, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Alnus × mayrii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
